metadata.title: Moniq
metadata.description: Personal finance management app built with Next.js and Supabase.

errors.unauthorized: Session expired. Reload the page and sign in again.
errors.unexpectedResponse: Finance API returned an unexpected response.
errors.requestTimedOut: Finance request timed out. Check the dev server and Supabase connection.

finance.schemaOutOfDate: Supabase schema is out of date. Run `npx supabase db push` and reload the app.

imports.debtWalletRequired: Choose the debt account before confirming this import.
imports.debtWalletDifferentRequired: Choose a different debt account for this payment.
imports.transferWalletDifferentRequired: Choose a different destination wallet for this transfer.
imports.transactionDeleteDraftOnly: Only draft imported transactions can be deleted.
imports.fileRequired: Choose a CSV file to import.
imports.invalidFile: CSV file did not contain recognizable transaction rows.

category.replacementRequired: Choose a replacement category before deleting this category.
category.replacementSameType: Replacement category must have the same type.
category.parentSameType: Parent category must have the same type.
category.cannotBeOwnParent: A category cannot be its own parent.
category.cannotMoveUnderDescendant: A category cannot be moved under its own descendant.

transaction.categoryTypeMismatch: Choose a category with the matching type.
transaction.debtCategoryExpenseOnly: Debt payment interest can only use an expense category.
transaction.goalWalletMismatch: Selected savings goal must belong to the savings wallet used in the transaction.
transaction.saveToGoalNeedsSavings: Save to goal must land in a savings wallet.
transaction.spendFromGoalNeedsSavings: Spend from goal must start from a savings wallet.
transaction.debtNeedsDebtAccount: Debt payment must target a debt account.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in with your email and password to continue.

signup.title: Create your Moniq account
signup.description: Create a secure account to start managing your money.
signup.alternate: Already have an account? Log in

messages.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

loading.title: Loading dashboard
loading.description: Fetching wallet balances and transaction activity from Supabase.

error.title: Unable to load dashboard
error.description: Finance data could not be loaded.

balanceCard.title: Balances by currency
balanceCard.description: No exchange-rate conversion yet, so totals stay separated by wallet currency.

summaryCard.title: Cashflow by currency
summaryCard.description: Income and expenses stay separated until FX support is added.

recent.title: Recent transactions
recent.description: A simple rolling list for quick review.

error.title: Unable to load calendar
error.description: Finance data could not be loaded.

view.title: Monthly view
view.description: Scan the month and review the selected day as an agenda.
view.selectedDescription: Planned and paid transactions for the selected day.

board.dayDescription: Selected day with planned and paid transactions.
board.empty: No transactions for the selected day.

navigator.description: Select a day to inspect related transactions.

loading.title: Loading today
loading.description: Fetching planned and paid transactions from Supabase.

error.title: Unable to load today
error.description: Finance data could not be loaded.

view.title: Today
view.description: Use the month as the default planning surface. Select a date to inspect only that day's planned transactions.

planned.title: Planned transactions
planned.description: Due today and overdue items that still need action.
planned.empty: Nothing planned or overdue right now.

board.selectedDescription: Planned transactions scheduled exactly for the selected day.
board.monthDescription: Active planned transactions visible in the current month.
board.empty: No active planned items in this month.
board.selectedEmpty: No planned items for this day.

loading.title: Loading balance
loading.description: Fetching wallets and savings groups from Supabase.

error.title: Unable to load balance
error.description: Finance data could not be loaded.

view.title: Balance
view.description: Track money across wallets and savings spaces. Pick a wallet when you want a narrower transaction list.
view.editModeDescription: Add, rename, and remove wallets in place. Every group stays visible so new accounts can be created exactly where they belong.
view.emptyHint: No wallets yet. Turn on wallet management to start building your balance spaces.
view.emptyEditHint: Choose a group and use the plus control there to create the first wallet.
view.selectedGoalActivityDescription: Transactions for the selected savings goal.
view.allActivityDescription: All transactions across your balance spaces.
view.noBalanceSpacesDescription: Create your first wallet to start organizing real balances in Supabase.

messages.noTransactionsForWallet: No transactions for this wallet yet. Transactions will appear here once they occur.
messages.noTransactionsForGoal: No transactions for this savings goal yet. Goal activity will appear here once it occurs.

form.description: Cash wallets spend directly. Savings hold reserved money. Credit cards track debt against a spending limit.

validation.creditLimitRequired: Credit limit is required for a credit card.
validation.creditLimitPositive: Credit limit must be greater than 0.
validation.creditLimitExceeded: Current balance cannot exceed the credit limit.

allocationForm.description: Reserve savings for a flexible goal or a goal with a target amount.

validation.targetPositive: Target amount must be greater than 0.
validation.targetRequired: Target amount is required for a targeted goal.
validation.exceedsSavings: This allocation would exceed the available savings balance.

loading.title: Loading budget
loading.description: Fetching categories and completed transactions from Supabase.

error.title: Unable to load budget
error.description: Finance data could not be loaded.

view.title: Budget
view.description: Review this month's category structure with expenses and income separated into their own working columns.

sections.expensesDescription: Expense categories with this month's completed activity.
sections.expensesEmpty: No expense activity recorded in this month.
sections.incomeDescription: Income categories with this month's completed activity.
sections.incomeEmpty: No income activity recorded in this month.

category.noTransactions: No transactions in this category for the selected month.

tree.childrenCount: {count, plural, =0 {No child categories} one {# child category} other {# child categories}}

form.description: Build nested income and expense trees with reusable icon labels.

delete.title: Delete category
delete.descriptionWithTransactions: Transactions stay in place, but they need to be reassigned before this category can be removed.
delete.descriptionWithoutTransactions: This will remove the category and lift its children one level up.
delete.linkedTransactions: {count, plural, =0 {No linked transactions} one {# linked transaction} other {# linked transactions}}

view.title: Categories
view.description: Income and expense trees aggregate all linked transaction amounts from their descendants.
view.emptyDescription: Start with one expense or income category and grow the tree from there.

loading.title: Loading transactions
loading.description: Fetching categories, savings goals, and transaction register from Supabase.

error.title: Unable to load transactions
error.description: Finance data could not be loaded.

kindDescriptions.save_to_goal: Move money into a savings goal
kindDescriptions.spend_from_goal: Use money from a savings goal

view.title: Transactions
view.description: Record expenses, income, transfers, savings moves, and debt payments in one register.
view.emptyAccountsDescription: Transactions need existing accounts and savings wallets before they can be recorded.

form.description: Use one form for income, expenses, transfers, savings moves, and debt payments.
form.batchDescription: Keep the date and account fixed, then enter multiple rows in one pass.

footer.batchSummary: {count, plural, one {# row ready to save.} other {# rows ready to save.}}
footer.singleSummary: Review the details and save when ready.

validation.destinationAmountPositive: Destination amount must be greater than 0.
validation.fxRatePositive: FX rate must be greater than 0.
validation.transferNoCategory: Transfers do not use a category.
validation.debtBreakdownRequired: Provide at least one debt payment amount.
validation.debtBreakdownMismatch: Amount must equal principal + interest + extra principal.
validation.destinationAmountRequired: Destination amount is required for account-to-account moves.
validation.lineItemsRequired: Add at least one transaction row.
validation.recurringMustBePlanned: Recurring transactions must start as planned.
validation.recurrenceUntilBeforeStart: End repeat must be on or after the start date.

mcp.title: Claude MCP Connector
mcp.description: Connect Claude to Moniq so it can send transaction batches for review. Paste a bank screenshot or statement into Claude and ask it to submit transactions to Moniq.
mcp.oauthStep1: Step 1: Add Moniq to Claude — open Claude.ai, go to Settings → Integrations → Add integration, and paste this URL:
mcp.oauthStep2: Step 2: Authorize — Claude will redirect you to Moniq to approve access. Sign in and click Allow.
mcp.oauthStep3: Step 3: In Claude, paste a bank screenshot or file and ask: "Submit these transactions to Moniq".
mcp.advancedShow: Advanced: manual setup for other MCP clients
mcp.advancedDescription: For MCP clients that don't support OAuth, create an API key below and configure it manually.
mcp.apiKeysDescription: OAuth tokens and manually created keys that authorize Claude to submit batches on your behalf. Revoke any key to disconnect that session.
mcp.rawKeyNotice: Copy this key now — it won't be shown again.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.description: Review pending transactions from Claude and CSV imports.
inbox.emptyDescription: No pending transactions. Ask Claude to submit a batch or import a CSV file.

claudeInbox.title: Claude Inbox
claudeInbox.description: Transaction batches submitted by Claude from your bank screenshots and files. Review, edit categories and accounts, then approve.

error.title: Unable to load Claude Inbox
error.description: Batch data could not be loaded.

empty.title: Nothing pending
empty.description: Ask Claude to submit a batch from a bank screenshot or statement.

hero.title: Import, review, confirm
hero.description: Upload a CSV export, let Moniq guess categories from previous decisions, then clear the remaining drafts in one fast pass.

loading.title: Loading import inbox
loading.description: Fetching uploaded batches, draft rows, and confirmation queue.

error.title: Unable to load import inbox
error.description: Imported transaction data could not be loaded.

feedback.uploadFailed: Unable to import transactions from the CSV file.
feedback.updateFailed: Unable to save imported transaction edits.
feedback.deleteFailed: Unable to delete the import batch.
feedback.deleteTransactionFailed: Unable to delete the imported transaction.

upload.title: Import CSV
upload.description: Upload a bank export, land every row as a draft, then clean merchant names and confirm only what looks right.
upload.fileRequired: Choose a CSV file to import.
upload.batchCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 batches} one {# batch} other {# batches}}
upload.latestBatch: {file} · {count, plural, =0 {0 new rows} one {# new row} other {# new rows}}
upload.batchRows: {count, plural, =0 {0 rows} one {# row} other {# rows}}
upload.batchesEmpty: Draft import batches will appear here after upload.
upload.emptyDescription: Upload your first bank export to populate the review inbox.

dropzone.title: Drop CSV
dropzone.description: Drop a bank export here or choose a file.

fields.walletHint: Pick the wallet that should receive these imported rows.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.description: Every imported transaction lands here as a draft. Clean merchant names, assign categories, then confirm in bulk.
inbox.count: {count, plural, =0 {0 drafts} one {# draft} other {# drafts}}
inbox.multiSelectHint: Select rows, apply one category to the batch, then confirm them in one pass.
inbox.emptyDescription: Upload another CSV file to import the next batch.

review.title: Review selected
review.description: Use the existing transaction row as context, then fix merchant and category before confirming.
review.emptyDescription: Pick a transaction from the inbox to review it in detail.

confirmed.title: Confirmed imports
confirmed.description: These imports were already pushed into the main transaction ledger.
confirmed.count: {count, plural, =0 {0 confirmed} one {# confirmed} other {# confirmed}}
confirmed.emptyDescription: Confirm a draft from the inbox to store it in the ledger.
